log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Half-Orc — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

→ Half-Orc — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
